events.text:

The photos show the current checkpoint scope finished for this area, with remaining work being cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint being scored. No component conditions are flagged. References are NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4.

This seems like a pass situation - the checkpoint scope is finished, remaining work is outside the checkpoint. No defects or hazards mentioned.
